decision_title: Auth module shipped with zero P0 bugs
evidence_quotes: Alex opened by confirming the auth module shipped last Friday with zero P0 bugs.

decision_title: JWT token expiry set to 24 hours
evidence_quotes: Ben said the JWT token expiry is set to 24 hours as agreed in Sprint 2.
Carol flagged that password reset emails are not being rate-limited.

decision_title: Password reset rate limit: 3 attempts per hour
evidence_quotes: Max 3 reset attempts per hour was agreed in the security review on 2026-06-28.

decision_title: API gateway will use AWS API Gateway
evidence_quotes: The API gateway will use AWS API Gateway with a 100 req/min limit per user.

decision_title: API gateway rate limit: 100 req/min per user
evidence_quotes: The API gateway will use AWS API Gateway with a 100 req/min limit per user.
